reviews.review_description: Fun game for sitting or standing.but a little bit slow and you don't always get your points for hitting the donuts.

reviews.review_title: This would be a 5 Star Game
reviews.review_description:
The most amazing feature this game has, that I haven't seen ANYWHERE else, is the ability to choose between 180 degrees, or 360 degrees mode. That's AWESOME! More games should have that option.

3 Levels? Is that it? GIVE ME MORE!

I would love to upgrade my gun. Let me purchase gun upgrades, and maybe new gun types. I'd love to be able to shoot as fast as I can pull the trigger. 

I love the art style, but some of the colors don't translate well to the Go. The pastels kind of wash out a bit. I'd love to see a color rework, to make this really pop.

I would love to see a multiplayer option for this AFTER the above upgrades are made. Side by Side, or Back to Back, either competitive, or Co-Op would be amazing. Could be a lot of silly fun (Think Death Horizon Multiplayer).

Please reply to this and let me know you'd love to do some upgrades! Totally worth the purchase and I'd recommend to everyone if the above changes were made.
Good zombie donut fun! Great launching trick shots off buildings. And that marshmallow launcher sound!!
This 72-year-old is enjoying the graphical excellence, fun factor and challenge of this unique game that can appeal to all ages.  Great use of VR technology.

REVISED REVIEW: It's a pretty good starter game but it took the devs a while to fix the bug on the Go after release. However, as a fun little wave shooter that isn't offensive in any way and is appropriate for all ages, I do recommend it.

ORIGINAL REVIEW: I am the only person to rate or review the game. When I get into the game from the Oculus Go the gun is visible and works for a fraction of a second. Then it disappears and the game just cannot be played. I can’t even start it. There might be a decent game behind this game breaking bug but it is just broken at the moment. Don’t buy until the dev fixes it.

Zombie Donuts is a fun game. It is colorful with fairly cute graphics. There should be a brief tutorial to let you know how to get started, how to select couch or 360 degrees mode and how to score. Also, my game froze after the seventh level with no way to progress. It only costs $2.00, but I still expect to be able to complete the game.
My kids love it and I think it is so fun. Great game.
I really like this new take on shooting zombies.  I love the background of the game and the donut zombies are really funny.  Definitely worth every penny.

reviews.review_title: I am so loving this game!!
reviews.review_description: Only wish they had more levels and different weapons to choose from. Other than that , this game gets two thumbs up five stars.
Lots of fun, agree with previous reviewer would be great to upgrade the gun and more levels plus also have an endless mode where the mobs build up and get faster and faster.  Love the game though.
